artifacts.excerpt: @DamonBowman5 @GadSaad @KingJames @Ibra_official No he shouldn't, that would be unrelastic, and I think you're right on that point. As far as James is concerned there was the prominent case where he criticized Morey for speaking out about Hong Kong, presumably because it hurts his commercial brand. Hence the hypocrisy charge.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2021-06-09
artifacts.excerpt:
@rasmansa I think the best you can hope to do is tease out what you actually disagree about. Do we disagree about facts, or is there a value conflict?

With the first kind, you may gain from further discussion. With the second kind, further argument is probably hopeless.
